summary: Comprehensive testing of LendSplit MVP (backend + frontend mobile UI). 30/30 backend pytest tests passed (100%). Frontend mobile flows verified: JWT login, mode toggle, dashboard, subscription page, add-loan modal, tabs navigation, profile - all working with proper testIDs.

minor.issue: EmailStr (pydantic) rejects RFC special-use TLDs like .test (returns 422). Not a bug per se, but worth documenting — only public TLDs accepted.

passlib emits a benign warning 'AttributeError: module bcrypt has no attribute __about__' on startup due to bcrypt 4.x. Functionally works (signup/login/me/logout all pass). Consider pinning bcrypt<4 or upgrading passlib to silence.

issues: React Native web warns: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'. Cosmetic — does not affect rendering.
Warning: props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents.

react_native_issues.issue: Listening to push token changes is not yet fully supported on web (expected on web preview; works on native).

action_items: (Optional) Suppress passlib/bcrypt 4.x warning by pinning bcrypt==3.2.2 or upgrading passlib.
(Optional) Migrate React Native 'shadow*' props to 'boxShadow' to remove deprecation warnings.
Document that EmailStr does not accept .test/.localhost TLDs (use public TLDs for any seed data).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 555 lines and contains all routes — consider splitting into routers (auth/loans/contacts/subscription) for maintainability as it grows past 700 lines.
get_current_user falls through on jwt.InvalidTokenError into session-token lookup — works, but expired JWTs become 'Invalid token' rather than 'Token expired'. Minor UX.
MongoDB _id is correctly excluded everywhere via projection {'_id': 0} or pop — good.
Frontend correctly uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL via lib/api.ts (note: env key is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL, not EXPO_BACKEND_URL — matches Expo SDK 49+ convention).
seed_data_creation: Created two test users per pytest session (test_user_*@example.com, test_other_*@example.com) plus several public loans. Demo user demo@lendsplit.app / demo1234 remains as seed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend BASE URL is in frontend/.env as EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests covers health, auth (signup/login/me/logout/duplicate/wrong-pwd/no-token), contacts (create/list/search), loans (CRUD + private-mode rejection + cross-user 403), dashboard summary (with computed interest math), and subscription (plans + subscribe mocked + status). Frontend testIDs available: login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button, mode-toggle, mode-public-button, mode-private-button, dashboard-hero-card, dashboard-total-outstanding, stat-monthly-interest, stat-active-loans, see-all-loans-link, empty-add-loan-button. Subscription page reachable at /subscription, add-loan modal at /add-loan.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. Only minor warnings (deprecated React Native style props, passlib/bcrypt 4.x warning) that don't affect functionality.
